entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: The target crop species used for the genome-wide identification and analysis of sodium transporters.

entities.name: SODIUM-PROTON ANTIPORTER (NHX)
entities.description: A type of sodium transporter identified in Sorghum bicolor involved in salt stress and development.

entities.name: SODIUM-PROTON EXCHANGER (NHE)
entities.description: A type of sodium transporter identified in Sorghum bicolor involved in salt stress and development.

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress condition that Na+ transporters play an important role in managing.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress condition used to analyze the expression patterns of SbNHX and SbNHE transporters.

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: An abiotic stress condition used to analyze the expression patterns of SbNHX and SbNHE transporters.

entities.name: COLD
entities.description: An abiotic stress condition used to analyze the expression patterns of SbNHX and SbNHE transporters.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: General category of environmental stresses including salt, drought, heat, and cold.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process used to identify all NHX and NHE homologs within the Sorghum bicolor genome.

entities.name: IN SILICO ANALYSIS
entities.description: Computational analysis used to study the characteristics of identified sodium-proton antiporters and exchangers.

entities.name: REAL-TIME GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: A method used to measure the expression patterns of transporter genes under various stresses and in different tissues.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to infer ortholog and paralog groups of the identified transporters.

entities.name: PROTEIN-PROTEIN INTERACTION NETWORKS
entities.description: A method used to reveal the interaction between SbNHX7 and other proteins.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 2
entities.description: A specific chromosomal region in Sorghum bicolor identified as a hotspot for sodium transporters.

entities.name: SBNHX7
entities.description: A specific sodium-proton antiporter gene involved in the CBL-CIPK pathway.

entities.name: CALCINEURIN B-LIKE PROTEINS (CBL)
entities.description: Proteins that interact with SbNHX7 in a specific signaling pathway.

entities.name: CBL INTERACTING PROTEIN KINASES (CIPK)
entities.description: Kinases that interact with SbNHX7 in a specific signaling pathway.

entities.name: AMILORIDE
entities.description: A known inhibitor of Na+/H+ exchanger activity used to identify binding motifs.

entities.name: EMBRYO
entities.description: A tissue in Sorghum bicolor where gene expression was analyzed.

entities.name: ROOT
entities.description: A tissue in Sorghum bicolor where gene expression was analyzed.

entities.name: STEM
entities.description: A tissue in Sorghum bicolor where gene expression was analyzed.

entities.name: LEAF
entities.description: A tissue in Sorghum bicolor where gene expression was analyzed.
